mapper.sql: id, question_set_id, user_id, content, sentiment, like_count, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.question_set_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.sentiment, c.like_count, c.create_time, c.update_time, u.username, u.nickname,
EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM question_set_comment_like l WHERE l.comment_id = c.id AND l.user_id = #{currentUserId} ) AS liked_by_current_user
FALSE AS liked_by_current_user
FROM question_set_comment c INNER JOIN question_set qs ON qs.id = c.question_set_id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.question_set_id = #{questionSetId} AND qs.is_public = 1
ORDER BY c.like_count DESC, c.create_time DESC
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM question_set_comment c INNER JOIN question_set qs ON qs.id = c.question_set_id WHERE c.question_set_id = #{questionSetId} AND qs.is_public = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE question_set_comment SET like_count = like_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{commentId}
UPDATE question_set_comment SET like_count = CASE WHEN like_count > 0 THEN like_count - 1 ELSE 0 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{commentId}
